ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monsters" (
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monster */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the monster */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype or class of the monster */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the monster */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the monster */,
  "magicka" INTEGER /* Magicka points of the monster */,
  "stamina" INTEGER /* Stamina points of the monster */,
  "loot_table_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loot table for the monster */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or special abilities of the monster */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* Weaknesses of the monster (e.g., fire, ice, lightning) */,
  "resistances" TEXT /* Resistances of the monster (e.g., fire, ice, lightning) */,
  "immunities" TEXT /* Immunities of the monster (e.g., poison, disease) */,
  "default_spawn_location" TEXT /* Default spawn location of the monster in the game world */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the monster's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monsters_loot_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("loot_table_id") REFERENCES loot_tables ("loot_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monster that uses the weapon */,
  "weapon_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of the weapon (e.g., bow, sword, staff) */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Base damage of the weapon */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the weapon */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapons_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armor" (
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of armor */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monster that wears the armor */,
  "armor_name" TEXT /* Name of the armor */,
  "armor_type" TEXT /* Type of the armor (e.g., light, medium, heavy) */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense value of the armor */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the armor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("armor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_armor_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_tables" (
  "loot_table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot table */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item that can drop from the monster */,
  "drop_chance" INTEGER /* Chance of the item dropping from the monster (as a percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loot_table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_tables_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., weapon, armor, consumable) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the item */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the item (in gold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spells" (
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spell */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monster that can cast the spell */,
  "spell_name" TEXT /* Name of the spell */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spell's effects */,
  "cast_time" INTEGER /* Time it takes to cast the spell */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Time between casts of the spell */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Base damage of the spell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spells_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class or role of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the player */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Gold owned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monster_encounters" (
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encounter */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the encounter */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monster encountered */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the encounter (e.g., victory, defeat) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the encounter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the encounter in the game world */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monster_encounters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monster_encounters_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_drops" (
  "drop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot drop */,
  "encounter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the encounter where the loot was dropped */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item dropped */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item dropped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_drops_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES monster_encounters ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loot_drops_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who submitted the note */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monster the note is about */,
  "note" TEXT /* The note itself */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the note was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_notes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_notes_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verified_notes" (
  "verified_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verified note */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the note being verified */,
  "verified_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the note was verified */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* Lore master who verified the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verified_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_verified_notes_note_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_id") REFERENCES player_notes ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the achievement was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
